proposal_summary: A proposal to fund the production, launch, and distribution of physical luxury Noun sunglasses tied to a consumable NFT collection, requesting 115 ETH and 1 Noun.

disclosed_entities.name: NounsDAO Treasury
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This project would not have been possible without the NounsDAO and the treasury.

disclosed_entities.name: Zora
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: will be using Zora’s smart contract system to launch this NFT.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Fund smart contract, website, promotional material, distribution facility, and manufacturing.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: 115Ξ for creating the smart contract, website, promotional/marketing material... and to start manufacturing.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Reward proposers upon successful delivery of the first physical pair.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: 1 Noun of the DAO's choice upon successful delivery of the first physical pair of glasses.

claimed_complexity.reason: The on-chain actions simply involve transferring ETH and an NFT (Noun) to the proposers, which requires standard execution.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Funds Requested - 115Ξ... - 1 Noun of the DAO's choice upon successful delivery

limitations: No specific wallet or contract addresses are provided in the text for the transfer of the requested funds.
